items.title: 'Every day feels like a month': Iranians describe life under 'constant' US-Israeli strikes
items.description: Iranians are coping with daily strikes, internet blackouts, and security crackdowns - all while trying to stay in touch with loved ones.

items.title: Pentagon identifies four of six US soldiers killed in Iran conflict
items.description: The US soldiers were killed after a drone evaded air defences to hit a command centre in Port Shuaiba, Kuwait, on Sunday.

items.title: Russia blames Ukrainian naval drones as tanker sinks in Mediterranean
items.description: The Arctic Metagaz went down between Libya and Malta after it was hit by explosions and a fire, Libyan officials say.

items.title: Iran postpones Khamenei funeral as US-Israeli bombardment continues
items.description: An official says more preparations are needed for the three-day ceremony in Tehran, where the supreme leader will lie in state.

items.title: Watershed moment as Russia's sporting exile ends
items.description: Sports Editor Dan Roan analyses Russia's controversial return to global sporting action at the Winter Paralympics and what it might mean for other spo...
